name: DeepPartialConfig
description:
Deep partial config type for nested object support.
Note: Zod v4 doesn't have deepPartial(), so we use a type-only approach.

entries.name: plugins
entries.description: Plugins to load. Can be npm package names or local file paths.

entries.name: pluginConfig
entries.description:
Plugin-specific configuration keyed by plugin name.
Each plugin validates its own config via its configSchema.

tags.name: example

entries.name: sessionData
entries.type: string | { [x: string]: unknown; WABrowserId?: string | undefined; WASecretBundle?: string | undefined; WAToken1?: string | undefined; WAToken2?: string | undefined; } | undefined

entries.name: lightpanda
entries.type: { portStart: number; host: string; startupTimeoutMs: number; disableTelemetry: boolean; executablePath?: string | undefined; } | undefined

entries.name: proxyServerCredentials
entries.type: { address: string; username: string; password: string; protocol?: string | undefined; } | undefined

entries.name: logging
entries.type: { type: "file" | "console" | "syslog" | "elasticsearch"; level?: "error" | "warn" | "info" | "debug" | "verbose" | undefined; filename?: string | undefined; host?: string | undefined; port?: number | undefined; }[] | undefined

entries.name: devtools
entries.type: boolean | { user: string; pass: string; } | undefined

entries.name: cloudUploadOptions
entries.type: { provider: CLOUD_PROVIDERS; accessKeyId: string; secretAccessKey: string; bucket: string; region?: string | undefined; ignoreHostAccount?: boolean | undefined; directory?: string | undefined; public?: boolean | undefined; headers?: Record<string, string> | undefined; } | undefined

entries.name: integrations
entries.type: Record<string, { enabled: boolean; config: Record<string, string>; }> | undefined

entries.name: s3Sync
entries.type: { bucket: string; region: string; accessKeyId: string; secretAccessKey: string; syncInterval: number; endpoint?: string | undefined; host?: string | undefined; enableLocalCompression?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined
